metadata.name: GanbaruAI default skill tree
metadata.description: General-purpose radial DAG skill tree template covering 7 life/work domains. Designed as the default tree for all new users. 150 nodes, 7 branches, 5 depth levels, 12 cross-branch connections. Based on Path of Exile's three-tier node hierarchy, FFX Sphere Grid's progressive disclosure, and Maker Skill Trees' domain-specific structure.

design_notes.node_tiers: basic (small, connective tissue, easy to unlock), notable (medium, named landmarks, harder), keystone (large, transformative, require cross-branch mastery)
design_notes.cross_branch_types: bridge (boundary between two branches), multi_parent (prerequisites from 2+ branches), synergy (hidden until prerequisites from different branches are both met)
design_notes.progressive_disclosure: Show only unlocked nodes + immediate neighbors. Fade nodes 2+ steps away. Semantic zoom: zoomed out = branch clusters with completion %, zoomed in = individual nodes with details.
design_notes.max_choices_per_node: 3-5 next options visible at any node to avoid paradox of choice
design_notes.xp_curve: XP_required = (level / calibration_factor)^2, calibrated so lvl 1->2 ≈ 1 productive day (~200 XP), lvl 49->50 ≈ 2 weeks

branches.name: Health & Vitality
branches.description: Physical fitness, nutrition, mental wellness, and recovery. The foundation that supports every other branch.

branches.name: Career & Craft
branches.description: Technical skills, professional growth, and industry knowledge. The domain of your primary work.

branches.name: Knowledge & Learning
branches.description: Sciences, humanities, languages, and research. The pursuit of understanding.

branches.name: Creative Expression
branches.description: Writing, visual arts, music, and digital creation. The domain of making things that didn't exist before.

branches.name: Social & Communication
branches.description: Communication, relationships, leadership, and teaching. How you connect with and influence others.

branches.name: Financial Acumen
branches.description: Personal finance, investing, and business. Turning effort into sustainable resources.

branches.name: Inner Growth
branches.description: Self-discipline, emotional intelligence, philosophy, and habit formation. The invisible infrastructure of personal power.

nodes.name: You
nodes.description: The center of your skill tree. Not a skill — your identity. All branches radiate from here.
nodes.flavor_text: Every journey begins at the center.

nodes.name: Health & Vitality
nodes.description: Begin investing in your physical and mental foundation. Unlocks all Health sub-branches.
nodes.flavor_text: The body is the instrument through which all other skills are expressed.

nodes.name: Physical Fitness
nodes.description: Structured physical training. Covers cardio, strength, and flexibility as sub-paths.
nodes.flavor_text: The first step is always the hardest — but only the first time.

nodes.name: Nutrition
nodes.description: Understanding what fuels your body and building sustainable eating patterns.
nodes.flavor_text: You cannot outwork a bad diet.

nodes.name: Mental Wellness
nodes.description: Stress management, mindfulness, and psychological resilience practices.
nodes.flavor_text: The mind is a muscle that atrophies without care.

nodes.name: Rest & Recovery
nodes.description: Sleep optimization, active recovery, and understanding the role of downtime in performance.
nodes.flavor_text: Growth happens during rest, not during strain.

nodes.name: Cardiovascular Endurance
nodes.description: Running, cycling, swimming, or any sustained aerobic activity. Build your baseline stamina.
nodes.flavor_text: One more kilometer. Then one more.

nodes.name: Strength Training
nodes.description: Resistance training with progressive overload. Compound movements, form, and programming.
nodes.flavor_text: Iron doesn't judge. It only asks: can you lift it?

nodes.name: Flexibility & Mobility
nodes.description: Stretching routines, joint mobility work, and injury prevention through range-of-motion training.
nodes.flavor_text: The oak resists the wind and breaks. The reed bends and survives.

nodes.name: Meal Planning
nodes.description: Weekly meal preparation, grocery strategy, and building repeatable healthy eating systems.
nodes.flavor_text: Discipline is deciding what to eat before you're hungry.

nodes.name: Nutritional Science
nodes.description: Macronutrients, micronutrients, caloric balance, and evidence-based dietary knowledge.
nodes.flavor_text: Know what you consume and why.

nodes.name: Stress Management
nodes.description: Identifying stressors, coping strategies, breathing techniques, and building stress tolerance.
nodes.flavor_text: Pressure makes diamonds — but only if you don't shatter first.

nodes.name: Mindfulness Practice
nodes.description: Regular meditation, body scanning, present-moment awareness, and attention training.
nodes.flavor_text: Silence the noise. What remains is you.

nodes.name: Sleep Optimization
nodes.description: Consistent sleep schedule, environment optimization, and tracking sleep quality patterns.
nodes.flavor_text: The secret weapon of every high performer is eight hours of unconsciousness.

nodes.name: Active Recovery
nodes.description: Low-intensity movement on rest days, foam rolling, cold/heat therapy, and deload strategies.
nodes.flavor_text: Rest is not the absence of work. It is the other half of it.

nodes.name: Endurance Athlete
nodes.description: Training for distance events — marathon, triathlon, long-distance cycling. Periodized training and race preparation.
nodes.flavor_text: The race is not against others. It is against the version of you that wants to stop.

nodes.name: Functional Strength
nodes.description: Compound movement mastery, athletic performance, and strength that transfers to real-world capability.
nodes.flavor_text: Strength without mobility is a cage. Mobility without strength is fragility.

nodes.name: Healthy Cooking
nodes.description: Preparing nutritious meals with skill and variety. Turning nutritional knowledge into daily practice.
nodes.flavor_text: The kitchen is a laboratory where discipline meets pleasure.

nodes.name: Deep Meditation
nodes.description: Extended meditation sessions, advanced techniques (vipassana, loving-kindness), and sustained attention mastery.
nodes.flavor_text: In absolute stillness, the world becomes clear.

nodes.name: Circadian Mastery
nodes.description: Full control over your energy cycle through light exposure, meal timing, and sleep-wake consistency.
nodes.flavor_text: Align with the rhythm. The rhythm does not align with you.

nodes.name: Vitality Mastery
nodes.description: Complete integration of physical, nutritional, and mental health practices into an automatic lifestyle.
nodes.flavor_text: Your body, mind, and habits are one seamless instrument.

nodes.name: Career & Craft
nodes.description: Begin building professional competence. Unlocks Technical Skills, Professional Growth, and Industry Knowledge.
nodes.flavor_text: Your craft is how you leave a mark on the world.

nodes.name: Technical Skills
nodes.description: The hard skills of your profession — programming, design, analysis, tool mastery.
nodes.flavor_text: Tools extend the hand. Skill extends the mind.

nodes.name: Professional Growth
nodes.description: Networking, project management, and business presentation — the skills that multiply your technical ability.
nodes.flavor_text: Talent opens the door. Professionalism keeps it open.

nodes.name: Industry Knowledge
nodes.description: Understanding your market, staying current with trends, and building domain expertise.
nodes.flavor_text: Know the terrain before you march.

nodes.name: Programming
nodes.description: Writing code in one or more languages. Algorithms, data structures, and software engineering fundamentals.
nodes.flavor_text: The compiler does not care about your feelings. It only cares about your logic.

nodes.name: Design & Architecture
nodes.description: System design, UX principles, and the ability to structure complex solutions before building them.
nodes.flavor_text: Architecture is the art of making the complex feel inevitable.

nodes.name: Data Analysis
nodes.description: Extracting meaning from data — statistics, visualization, spreadsheets, SQL, and analytical thinking.
nodes.flavor_text: Data is noise until you ask the right question.

nodes.name: Tool Proficiency
nodes.description: Deep mastery of the specific tools of your trade — IDE, design software, spreadsheets, whatever you use daily.
nodes.flavor_text: A craftsman's hands know their tools without looking.

nodes.name: Professional Networking
nodes.description: Building and maintaining professional relationships. Conferences, communities, and genuine connection.
nodes.flavor_text: Your network is not who you know. It is who trusts you.

nodes.name: Project Management
nodes.description: Planning, tracking, and delivering projects. Scope management, timelines, and team coordination.
nodes.flavor_text: A plan is a promise you make to the future.

nodes.name: Business Presentation
nodes.description: Communicating ideas to stakeholders, clients, and teams. Slide decks, demos, and persuasive delivery.
nodes.flavor_text: If you cannot explain it, you do not understand it.

nodes.name: Domain Expertise
nodes.description: Deep knowledge of your specific industry — its history, players, regulations, and unwritten rules.
nodes.flavor_text: Generalists see the forest. Specialists see the tree. Experts see the roots.

nodes.name: Market Awareness
nodes.description: Tracking industry trends, emerging technologies, and shifts in demand. Staying ahead of the curve.
nodes.flavor_text: The market whispers before it shouts. Learn to listen.

nodes.name: System Architecture
nodes.description: Designing large-scale systems with sound technical foundations. The ability to see the whole before building the parts.
nodes.flavor_text: An architect builds the cathedral in their mind before the first stone is laid.

nodes.name: Data Science
nodes.description: Advanced analytics, machine learning fundamentals, and turning data into actionable decisions.
nodes.flavor_text: Numbers tell stories that words cannot.

nodes.name: Technical Leadership
nodes.description: Leading technical teams — mentoring junior developers, making architecture decisions, and bridging tech and business.
nodes.flavor_text: A leader's job is to make everyone around them better.

nodes.name: Industry Specialist
nodes.description: Recognized depth in your domain. The person others consult when the hard questions arise.
nodes.flavor_text: Specialization is the price of excellence.

nodes.name: Career Mastery
nodes.description: Deep technical skill combined with leadership and industry authority. You define the standard in your field.
nodes.flavor_text: Mastery is not a destination. It is the point where effort becomes invisible.

nodes.name: Knowledge & Learning
nodes.description: Begin the pursuit of understanding. Unlocks Sciences, Humanities, Languages, and Research Skills.
nodes.flavor_text: The more you learn, the more the world reveals itself.

nodes.name: Sciences
nodes.description: Mathematics, natural sciences, and computer science. The language of how things work.
nodes.flavor_text: Science is organized curiosity.

nodes.name: Humanities
nodes.description: History, philosophy, and psychology. Understanding people, cultures, and ideas across time.
nodes.flavor_text: To understand where you are going, study where others have been.

nodes.name: Languages
nodes.description: Learning new languages opens new worlds of thought, culture, and connection.
nodes.flavor_text: A new language is a new pair of eyes.

nodes.name: Research Skills
nodes.description: Critical thinking, academic writing, and the ability to find, evaluate, and synthesize information.
nodes.flavor_text: The quality of your answers depends on the quality of your questions.

nodes.name: Mathematics
nodes.description: From arithmetic to calculus. The universal language of patterns and proof.
nodes.flavor_text: Mathematics is the alphabet with which God wrote the universe.

nodes.name: Natural Sciences
nodes.description: Physics, chemistry, biology — understanding the physical world through observation and experiment.
nodes.flavor_text: Nature does not hide its secrets. It only requires patience.

nodes.name: Computer Science
nodes.description: Algorithms, computation theory, and the science behind software — distinct from practical programming.
nodes.flavor_text: A computer is a bicycle for the mind.

nodes.name: History
nodes.description: Studying past civilizations, events, and patterns. Understanding the cycles that shape the present.
nodes.flavor_text: Those who cannot remember the past are condemned to repeat it.

nodes.name: Philosophy
nodes.description: Logic, ethics, epistemology, and the practice of rigorous thinking about fundamental questions.
nodes.flavor_text: The unexamined life is not worth living.

nodes.name: Psychology
nodes.description: How the human mind works — cognition, behavior, motivation, and biases.
nodes.flavor_text: To understand others, first understand the machine behind your own eyes.

nodes.name: Second Language
nodes.description: Reaching conversational fluency in a language beyond your native tongue.
nodes.flavor_text: The first foreign word you truly understand changes how you think.

nodes.name: Third Language
nodes.description: Learning a third language is faster than the second — your brain has already built the pathways.
nodes.flavor_text: Three languages, three selves.

nodes.name: Critical Thinking
nodes.description: Identifying fallacies, evaluating evidence, distinguishing correlation from causation.
nodes.flavor_text: Think slowly. The world rewards those who refuse to be rushed.

nodes.name: Academic Writing
nodes.description: Structured argumentation, citations, and the discipline of communicating complex ideas precisely.
nodes.flavor_text: Clarity in writing is clarity in thought.

nodes.name: Scientific Method
nodes.description: Hypothesis formation, experimental design, peer review, and evidence-based reasoning as a life practice.
nodes.flavor_text: The method is more valuable than any single discovery.

nodes.name: Polyglot
nodes.description: Functional fluency in three or more languages. A fundamentally expanded worldview.
nodes.flavor_text: Every language is a different map of the same territory.

nodes.name: Analytical Reasoning
nodes.description: The ability to decompose any problem into its components and reconstruct it with new understanding.
nodes.flavor_text: See the pieces. See the connections. See what is missing.

nodes.name: Interdisciplinary Synthesis
nodes.description: Connecting ideas across different fields to produce insights that specialists in one domain miss.
nodes.flavor_text: Innovation lives at the borders between disciplines.

nodes.name: Scholar
nodes.description: Mastery of both analytical method and humanistic understanding. You generate knowledge, not just consume it.
nodes.flavor_text: A scholar does not merely know. A scholar questions.

nodes.name: Creative Expression
nodes.description: Begin creating. Unlocks Writing, Visual Arts, Music & Audio, and Digital Creation.
nodes.flavor_text: To create is to prove you were here.

nodes.name: Writing
nodes.description: The craft of putting thought into words — fiction, non-fiction, and poetry.
nodes.flavor_text: The first draft is you telling yourself the story.

nodes.name: Visual Arts
nodes.description: Drawing, painting, sculpture, and spatial thinking through visual media.
nodes.flavor_text: Your hands know things your mind has not yet articulated.

nodes.name: Music & Audio
nodes.description: Playing instruments, understanding theory, and producing sound.
nodes.flavor_text: Music is what feelings sound like.

nodes.name: Digital Creation
nodes.description: Photography, video production, and graphic design — creating with digital tools.
nodes.flavor_text: The medium is new. The impulse to create is ancient.

nodes.name: Fiction Writing
nodes.description: Storytelling, character development, world-building, and narrative structure.
nodes.flavor_text: Every character is a question the author is afraid to ask directly.

nodes.name: Non-Fiction Writing
nodes.description: Essays, articles, documentation, and the art of explaining real things clearly.
nodes.flavor_text: Truth is stranger than fiction — but harder to write well.

nodes.name: Poetry & Lyrics
nodes.description: Compression of language — saying the most with the least. Rhythm, imagery, and emotional precision.
nodes.flavor_text: Poetry is the shortest distance between two hearts.

nodes.name: Drawing & Illustration
nodes.description: Pencil, ink, digital — translating what you see (or imagine) onto a surface.
nodes.flavor_text: Every artist was first an amateur.

nodes.name: Painting
nodes.description: Color theory in practice — oils, acrylics, watercolors, or digital painting.
nodes.flavor_text: Color is a language the eyes understand before the brain.

nodes.name: Sculpture & 3D
nodes.description: Three-dimensional creation — clay, wood, 3D modeling, or any spatial medium.
nodes.flavor_text: To sculpt is to remove everything that is not the idea.

nodes.name: Instrument Practice
nodes.description: Consistent practice on a musical instrument. Technique, repertoire, and muscle memory.
nodes.flavor_text: The instrument resists you until it becomes part of you.

nodes.name: Music Theory
nodes.description: Scales, chords, harmony, rhythm, and the mathematical structure beneath all music.
nodes.flavor_text: Theory does not replace feeling. It gives feeling a vocabulary.

nodes.name: Audio Production
nodes.description: Recording, mixing, mastering, and sound design. The technical craft behind finished audio.
nodes.flavor_text: A producer hears what is not yet there.

nodes.name: Photography
nodes.description: Composition, lighting, editing, and the art of capturing a moment with intention.
nodes.flavor_text: The camera sees everything. The photographer sees meaning.

nodes.name: Video Production
nodes.description: Filming, editing, motion graphics, and visual storytelling through moving images.
nodes.flavor_text: Film is truth at twenty-four frames per second.

nodes.name: Graphic Design
nodes.description: Typography, layout, branding, and visual communication for digital and print.
nodes.flavor_text: Good design is invisible. You only notice it when it is absent.

nodes.name: Storyteller
nodes.description: Command of narrative across formats. The ability to hold attention and shape understanding through story.
nodes.flavor_text: Stories are the oldest technology. They run on every platform.

nodes.name: Visual Artist
nodes.description: A developed personal style and body of visual work. You express ideas through images.
nodes.flavor_text: Style is not what you choose. It is what remains after you stop imitating.

nodes.name: Musician
nodes.description: Performance-ready skill on an instrument combined with theoretical understanding. You can play, compose, or improvise.
nodes.flavor_text: The musician does not play notes. The musician plays silence between them.

nodes.name: Multimedia Creator
nodes.description: Combining video, graphics, and sound into polished digital content. The modern creative generalist.
nodes.flavor_text: The modern creator is a one-person studio.

nodes.name: Creative Mastery
nodes.description: Deep creative fluency across multiple media. You do not just create — you make things that move people.
nodes.flavor_text: Mastery is when technique disappears and only the idea remains.

nodes.name: Social & Communication
nodes.description: Begin building your ability to connect with and influence others.
nodes.flavor_text: No achievement means anything if you cannot share it.

nodes.name: Communication
nodes.description: Listening, persuasion, and written communication — the core of all human interaction.
nodes.flavor_text: Communication is not what you say. It is what they hear.

nodes.name: Relationships
nodes.description: Building and maintaining meaningful personal and professional connections.
nodes.flavor_text: The quality of your life is the quality of your relationships.

nodes.name: Leadership
nodes.description: Guiding teams, making decisions under uncertainty, and taking responsibility for outcomes.
nodes.flavor_text: A leader is someone who sees more, sees farther, and sees before others.

nodes.name: Teaching & Mentoring
nodes.description: Transferring knowledge and skill to others. The highest form of understanding.
nodes.flavor_text: If you cannot teach it, you have not truly learned it.

nodes.name: Active Listening
nodes.description: Fully engaging with what others say — reflecting, clarifying, and understanding before responding.
nodes.flavor_text: Most people listen to reply. Few listen to understand.

nodes.name: Persuasion & Influence
nodes.description: Ethical influence — framing arguments, reading audiences, and moving people toward shared goals.
nodes.flavor_text: Persuasion is not manipulation. It is helping others see what you see.

nodes.name: Written Communication
nodes.description: Emails, reports, messages — clear, concise professional writing that gets results.
nodes.flavor_text: Write as if the reader has five seconds. They do.

nodes.name: Empathy
nodes.description: Understanding others' perspectives, emotions, and motivations without judgment.
nodes.flavor_text: Empathy is not agreement. It is understanding.

nodes.name: Conflict Resolution
nodes.description: Navigating disagreements productively — de-escalation, mediation, and finding common ground.
nodes.flavor_text: The goal is not to win the argument. It is to solve the problem.

nodes.name: Healthy Boundaries
nodes.description: Saying no without guilt, protecting your time and energy, and maintaining self-respect in relationships.
nodes.flavor_text: A boundary is not a wall. It is a door with a lock you control.

nodes.name: Team Coordination
nodes.description: Working effectively in groups — role clarity, communication protocols, and collective problem-solving.
nodes.flavor_text: A team is not a group of people who work together. It is a group who trust each other.

nodes.name: Delegation
nodes.description: Assigning tasks based on strengths, providing clear context, and trusting others to deliver.
nodes.flavor_text: Delegation is not giving away work. It is multiplying yourself.

nodes.name: Strategic Vision
nodes.description: Seeing the long-term picture, communicating a compelling direction, and aligning people toward it.
nodes.flavor_text: Vision without execution is hallucination. But execution without vision is just labor.

nodes.name: Mentoring
nodes.description: Guiding someone's development over time — sharing experience, asking the right questions, and knowing when to step back.
nodes.flavor_text: A mentor does not create a copy. A mentor creates someone better than themselves.

nodes.name: Public Presentation
nodes.description: Standing before an audience and delivering ideas with clarity, confidence, and impact.
nodes.flavor_text: Stage fright is not your enemy. Silence is.

nodes.name: Negotiation
nodes.description: Finding agreements that work for all parties. Understanding leverage, BATNA, and creative deal-making.
nodes.flavor_text: The best negotiation is the one where both sides believe they won.

nodes.name: Community Building
nodes.description: Creating and nurturing groups around shared purpose. Fostering belonging and collective identity.
nodes.flavor_text: A community is not built by gathering people. It is built by giving them a reason to stay.

nodes.name: Team Director
nodes.description: Running a team or organization. Strategy, culture, hiring, and accountability at scale.
nodes.flavor_text: A director does not do the work. A director makes the work possible.

nodes.name: Social Mastery
nodes.description: The rare combination of deep empathy, strategic communication, and the ability to build lasting institutions.
nodes.flavor_text: Influence is not control. It is the gravity that draws others toward a better direction.

nodes.name: Financial Acumen
nodes.description: Begin understanding money. Unlocks Personal Finance, Investing, and Business.
nodes.flavor_text: Money is not the goal. Freedom is. Money is the tool.

nodes.name: Personal Finance
nodes.description: Budgeting, saving, debt management, and building a stable financial foundation.
nodes.flavor_text: Wealth begins with knowing where your money goes.

nodes.name: Investing
nodes.description: Making your money work — stocks, bonds, real estate, and alternative assets.
nodes.flavor_text: The best time to invest was yesterday. The second best is today.

nodes.name: Business & Entrepreneurship
nodes.description: Creating value through products and services. From side projects to full ventures.
nodes.flavor_text: Business is solving problems for profit.

nodes.name: Budgeting
nodes.description: Tracking income and expenses, building spending plans, and living intentionally within your means.
nodes.flavor_text: A budget is not a restriction. It is a permission slip for what matters.

nodes.name: Debt Management
nodes.description: Strategies for eliminating high-interest debt, refinancing, and understanding good vs. bad debt.
nodes.flavor_text: Debt is future you paying for past you's impatience.

nodes.name: Emergency Fund
nodes.description: Building 3–6 months of expenses as a financial safety net. Peace of mind in liquid form.
nodes.flavor_text: An emergency fund is not an investment. It is insurance against chaos.

nodes.name: Tax Strategy
nodes.description: Understanding tax brackets, deductions, tax-advantaged accounts, and legal optimization.
nodes.flavor_text: It is not what you earn. It is what you keep.

nodes.name: Stock Market
nodes.description: Understanding equities, index funds, ETFs, and long-term market behavior.
nodes.flavor_text: The market rewards patience and punishes panic.

nodes.name: Real Estate
nodes.description: Property investment, rental income, and understanding real estate as an asset class.
nodes.flavor_text: Land is the one thing they are not making more of.

nodes.name: Alternative Investments
nodes.description: Crypto, commodities, collectibles, and non-traditional assets. Higher risk, higher potential.
nodes.flavor_text: Diversification is the only free lunch in investing.

nodes.name: Side Business
nodes.description: Launching a small venture alongside your main work. Validating ideas with minimal risk.
nodes.flavor_text: Start small. Start now. Start imperfectly.

nodes.name: Revenue Streams
nodes.description: Creating multiple income sources — freelancing, digital products, licensing, passive income.
nodes.flavor_text: One stream can dry up. Many streams make a river.

nodes.name: Basic Accounting
nodes.description: Reading financial statements, cash flow management, and understanding where money actually goes in a business.
nodes.flavor_text: Revenue is vanity. Profit is sanity. Cash is reality.

nodes.name: Portfolio Management
nodes.description: Asset allocation, rebalancing, risk-adjusted returns, and long-term investment strategy.
nodes.flavor_text: A good portfolio is boring. Boring is profitable.

nodes.name: Entrepreneur
nodes.description: Running a real business — hiring, scaling, managing cash flow, and serving customers at scale.
nodes.flavor_text: An entrepreneur is someone who jumps off a cliff and builds a plane on the way down.

nodes.name: Wealth Building
nodes.description: Systematic wealth accumulation — combining savings discipline, tax optimization, and compound growth.
nodes.flavor_text: Wealth is not built in a day. It is built in a decade of days.

nodes.name: Financial Freedom
nodes.description: Your investments and income streams cover your lifestyle. Work becomes a choice, not a necessity.
nodes.flavor_text: Freedom is not having more. It is needing less than you have.

nodes.name: Inner Growth
nodes.description: Begin building the invisible infrastructure of personal power. Unlocks Self-Discipline, Emotional Intelligence, Philosophy, and Habit Architecture.
nodes.flavor_text: The hardest battles are the ones no one sees.

nodes.name: Self-Discipline
nodes.description: The ability to do what needs to be done regardless of how you feel about it.
nodes.flavor_text: Discipline is choosing between what you want now and what you want most.

nodes.name: Emotional Intelligence
nodes.description: Recognizing, understanding, and managing your own emotions and those of others.
nodes.flavor_text: Intelligence without emotional awareness is a ship without a rudder.

nodes.name: Philosophy & Values
nodes.description: Defining what you believe, why you believe it, and how those beliefs guide your actions.
nodes.flavor_text: A person without principles is a leaf in the wind.

nodes.name: Habit Architecture
nodes.description: The science and practice of building routines that run on autopilot.
nodes.flavor_text: You do not rise to the level of your goals. You fall to the level of your systems.

nodes.name: Time Management
nodes.description: Prioritization frameworks, time-blocking, and protecting your attention as your most valuable resource.
nodes.flavor_text: You cannot manage time. You can only manage attention.

nodes.name: Delayed Gratification
nodes.description: The ability to sacrifice short-term pleasure for long-term reward. The meta-skill beneath all achievement.
nodes.flavor_text: The marshmallow test is every decision you make, every day.

nodes.name: Consistency
nodes.description: Showing up every day regardless of motivation. The compound interest of personal development.
nodes.flavor_text: Motivation gets you started. Consistency gets you results.

nodes.name: Self-Awareness
nodes.description: Honest assessment of your strengths, weaknesses, biases, and patterns without defensive distortion.
nodes.flavor_text: The mirror does not lie. But most people look away.

nodes.name: Emotional Regulation
nodes.description: Managing emotional responses — not suppressing them, but choosing how to express and channel them.
nodes.flavor_text: Between stimulus and response there is a space. In that space is your power.

nodes.name: Resilience Foundations
nodes.description: Bouncing back from setbacks. Reframing failure as data, not identity.
nodes.flavor_text: You are not fragile. You are antifragile — you grow from the breaking.

nodes.name: Stoic Practice
nodes.description: Applying Stoic philosophy to daily life — focusing on what you control and accepting what you cannot.
nodes.flavor_text: The obstacle is not in the way. The obstacle is the way.

nodes.name: Personal Ethics
nodes.description: A defined moral framework that guides decisions when no one is watching.
nodes.flavor_text: Character is what you do when it costs you something.

nodes.name: Sense of Purpose
nodes.description: A clear answer to 'why am I doing this?' that sustains effort when motivation fades.
nodes.flavor_text: He who has a why can bear almost any how.

nodes.name: Morning & Evening Routines
nodes.description: Structured daily bookends that set the tone and close the day with intention.
nodes.flavor_text: Win the morning, win the day.

nodes.name: Habit Stacking
nodes.description: Chaining new habits to existing ones. Using established routines as anchors for new behaviors.
nodes.flavor_text: Attach the new to the old. The old carries the new.

nodes.name: Self-Tracking
nodes.description: Measuring what matters — journaling, metrics, and honest self-assessment as daily practice.
nodes.flavor_text: What gets measured gets managed. What gets managed gets improved.

nodes.name: Grit
nodes.description: Sustained passion and perseverance toward long-term goals. Continuing when talent and enthusiasm are not enough.
nodes.flavor_text: Grit is not clenching your jaw. It is showing up again tomorrow.

nodes.name: Emotional Mastery
nodes.description: Full ownership of your emotional landscape. You feel deeply but are never controlled by feeling.
nodes.flavor_text: Mastery is not the absence of emotion. It is the presence of choice.

nodes.name: Applied Wisdom
nodes.description: Philosophy in action — making consistently good decisions by integrating experience, values, and knowledge.
nodes.flavor_text: Knowledge is knowing the path. Wisdom is walking it.

nodes.name: Personal Operating System
nodes.description: A fully integrated set of routines, habits, and tracking systems that run your life on autopilot.
nodes.flavor_text: The system runs you so you can focus on what the system cannot do.

nodes.name: Inner Mastery
nodes.description: Complete self-governance — disciplined, emotionally intelligent, purpose-driven, and systematized.
nodes.flavor_text: You are no longer at war with yourself. The war is over. Now you build.

nodes.name: Technical Writing
nodes.description: Explaining complex technical concepts clearly. Documentation, tutorials, and knowledge sharing.

cross_branch.visual_position: boundary between Career and Creative arcs

nodes.flavor_text: The rarest skill in technology: the ability to explain.

nodes.name: Content Creation
nodes.description: Building an audience through consistent, valuable content — combining media skills with professional reach.

cross_branch.visual_position: boundary between Creative and Career arcs

nodes.flavor_text: Distribution is as important as creation. The world cannot value what it cannot find.

nodes.name: Mindful Leadership
nodes.description: Leading with self-awareness, emotional regulation, and presence. Discipline turned outward.

cross_branch.visual_position: boundary between Inner Growth and Social arcs

nodes.flavor_text: The best leaders do not demand attention. They command respect through stillness.

nodes.name: Data-Driven Decisions
nodes.description: Using analytical skills to make sound financial and business decisions backed by evidence.

cross_branch.visual_position: boundary between Career and Financial arcs

nodes.flavor_text: Gut feelings are hypotheses. Data is the experiment.

nodes.name: Public Speaking
nodes.description: Commanding a room — combining social presentation skills with professional communication polish.
nodes.flavor_text: The stage does not care about your fear. It only cares about your message.

nodes.name: Coaching & Training
nodes.description: Professionally guiding others' development using psychological understanding and teaching skill.
nodes.flavor_text: A coach sees the person behind the performance.

nodes.name: Startup Founder
nodes.description: Building a company from zero — combining entrepreneurial drive with technical leadership.
nodes.flavor_text: A startup is a bet you place on yourself with borrowed time.

nodes.name: Research Design
nodes.description: Combining data analysis with scientific methodology to design rigorous studies and experiments.
nodes.flavor_text: HIDDEN SYNERGY — Unlocked when Data Analysis and Scientific Method are both completed.

nodes.name: Holistic Wellness
nodes.description: Complete integration of physical health practices with emotional mastery. Mind and body as one system.

cross_branch.visual_position: between Health and Inner Growth arcs

nodes.flavor_text: HIDDEN SYNERGY — Unlocked when Deep Meditation and Emotional Mastery are both completed.

nodes.name: Creative Problem-Solving
nodes.description: Applying storytelling and lateral thinking to analytical challenges. Seeing solutions others miss.
nodes.flavor_text: HIDDEN SYNERGY — Unlocked when Analytical Reasoning and Storyteller are both completed.

nodes.name: Creator Economy
nodes.description: Monetizing creative output — turning multimedia skills into sustainable income through digital products and audience.
nodes.flavor_text: HIDDEN SYNERGY — Unlocked when Side Business and Multimedia Creator are both completed.

nodes.name: Resilient Athlete
nodes.description: Physical endurance powered by mental grit. The body follows where the will leads.

cross_branch.visual_position: between Health and Inner Growth arcs

nodes.flavor_text: HIDDEN SYNERGY — Unlocked when Endurance Athlete and Grit are both completed.

rendering_hints.layout: radial DAG from center origin node

edge_style.cross_branch: dashed, gradient between the two branch colors

progressive_disclosure.hidden_synergy: completely invisible until trigger conditions met, then revealed with animation

rendering_hints.decay_visual: node dims proportionally to displayed_level / actual_level ratio. Below 50% ratio: add subtle corruption-style particle effect

semantic_zoom.far: show only branch root nodes as colored clusters with completion percentage labels
semantic_zoom.medium: show branch roots + notable nodes as landmarks
semantic_zoom.close: show all visible nodes with names and XP requirements
semantic_zoom.detail: show individual node with full description, prerequisites, tags, and flavor text

mobile.interaction: pinch-to-zoom, tap node for bottom sheet detail panel
mobile.navigation: branch selector tabs at top for jumping between branch clusters
